parameters.content:
## Google API Instructions
1. Go to [Google Cloud Console](https://console.cloud.google.com/)
   - Create a new project  
   - Enable **Custom Search API**  
   - Go to **Credentials** and copy your **API Key**

2. Go to [Programmable Search Engine](https://programmablesearchengine.google.com/controlpanel/create)
   - Create a name  
   - Select **Search entire web**  
   - Copy the **cx** value

## Usage Limits (Free Tier)
- The free tier of the Google Custom Search API allows **100 requests per day**
- Each request returns **up to 10 search results**
- This means you can get **up to 1,000 search results per day** at no cost


Original workflow by **Bart Slodyczka**
https://youtu.be/2oz2d9qoMm4?si=1JnlD8sZKwni_OU9

## Accounting Email Sorter  
1. Polls **Gmail** every minute for unread emails with attachments - downloads files  
2. Parses sender, subject, date, and body - generates long unique **ID**  
3. Uses **AI** to extract currency, price, VAT, and an **accounting** flag  
4. If accounting=true → keep; else label email as non-accounting and stop  
5. Uploads all attachments to **Google Drive** and collects share links  
6. Merges email data + file links  
7. Appends a row to **Google Sheets** (“Facturen”)  
8. Labels the email as processed and marks it **read**

## Instagram Auto Post 
1. Triggers on schedule → pulls candidates from **Google Sheets**  
2. Filters posts (has image, not used, ≥500 likes)  
3. Downloads image → quick **OpenAI** check (content/type)  
4. If flagged → generate new image via **Replicate (Imagen 4)** and poll until done; else keep original  
5. Creates caption via **AI** → send image+text to **Telegram** for double approval  
6. On approval → set **Instagram** params (image_url, caption, account id)  
7. **Graph API** media create → poll until **FINISHED**  
8. **Graph API** media publish → poll until **PUBLISHED**  
9. Notify “Posted!” on **Telegram**  
10. Update **Google Sheets** → `used = true`

 → `instagram.com/foxmowochi/`

## LinkedIn Auto Connect  
1. Runs daily - Triggers automatically  
2. Gets leads from **Google Sheets** - Only where `connected = false`  
3. Picks **12–20 random leads**  
4. Checks **LinkedIn** status - Skips if connected or pending  
5. Writes a short **AI message** - Natural, no sales, no questions  
6. Sends invite via **Browserflow**  
7. Updates **Google Sheets** → `connected = true`  
8. Waits **20–80 min** before next lead

## Amsterdam Afval Meld Bot  
1. Daily trigger **09:20** → 50/50 coin flip to run or stop  
2. Decide batch size **15–25** → loop through requests  
3. Build randomized address on **Witte de Withstraat** (keeps house-number parity)  
4. Geocode via **Nominatim** → extract postcode, number, lat/lon  
5. Create case on **Meldingen Amsterdam** (category: afval/overig-afval)  
6. Fetch street images → sanitize filenames → attach to case via API  
7. Wait **10s** → then random **5–25 min** before next request  
8. Safety **Limit** node protects API burst

## Multi-Model Image Generator 
1. **Start** → kick off all models in parallel with the same `prompt`
2. **POST to Replicate**: Imagen 4, Flux 1.1 Pro, Ideogram 3, Seedream 4, Qwen-Image, Photon, Nano Banana, SD 3.5 Large (all 1:1)
3. **Poll status** for each job → `succeeded` routes to send, `failed` → short **Wait** → re-poll
4. **Telegram sends** on success with model-specific captions: “Imagen 4”, “Flux 1.1 Pro”, “Ideogram 3”, “Seedream 4”, “Qwen-Image”, “Photon Flash”, “Nano Banana”, “Stable Diffusion 3.5”
5. **Staggered waits** (Wait5–Wait12) avoid message bursts and handle slow jobs
6. **Fallback loops**: each model has its own If → Wait → Poll chain to recover transient errors
7. **Outputs**: image URL(s) from Replicate → `sendPhoto` to chat 
8. **All parallel, same prompt** → fastest models deliver first; slower ones follow automatically

## SS26 New Amsterdam Surf

1. **Trigger:** Webhook
2. **Input:** Base64 image from POST payload → converted to binary  
3. **Detection:** GPT-4o counts visible people  
4. **Branch:**  
   - 0 people → stop (no faces found)  
   - ≥1 person → continue  
5. **Prompt:** Randomly selects 1 of 6 surreal scene prompts (beach, canals, dunes, ferry, etc.)  
6. **Generate:** Sends image + prompt to Replicate (Flux Kontext Max)  
7. **Poll:** Waits for result → retries on fail  
8. **NSFW Check:** Runs safety model → blocks explicit output  
9. **Face Swap:** Applies original face for realism consistency  
10. **Composite:** Merges top/background layers, centers subject  
11. **Save:** Uploads final image to Google Drive `/new-amsterdam`  
12. **Respond:** Returns final composite image to webhook caller


 → `ss26.newamsterdamsurf.com`

Florido Meacci
Creative Technologist
@ TBWA\

## Google API Instructions
1. Go to [Google Cloud Console](https://console.cloud.google.com/)
   - Create a new project  
   - Enable **Custom Search API**  
   - Go to **Credentials** and copy your **API Key**

2. Go to [Programmable Search Engine](https://programmablesearchengine.google.com/controlpanel/create)
   - Create a name  
   - Select **Search entire web**  
   - Copy the **cx** value

## Usage Limits (Free Tier)
1. The free tier of the Google Custom Search API allows **100 requests per day**
2. Each request returns **up to 10 search results**
3. This means you can get **up to 1,000 search results per day** at no cost

### www.reddituser.info

1. **Endpoint:** `POST /reddit-audit` → body: `{ username, sessionId }`
2. **Fetch:** Reddit OAuth — `/about`, `/submitted?limit=100`, `/comments?limit=100`
3. **Parse:** texts, timestamps, scores, URLs, `[removed]/[deleted]`, top 30 words
4. **Subs:** unique subreddits + post/comment counts, ranked + top subreddit
5. **LLM:** builds JSON summary from posts/subs/messages (use a neutral prompt)
6. **Stylometry:** simhash, 100 text chunks, cosine→angular distances, PCA + t-SNE, chunk→time mapping
7. **Output:** one JSON with profile stats, subreddit summary, top/worst posts & comments, URLs, removed count, word stats, stylometry

 → `reddituser.info`

## LG - Radio Optimism
1. **Endpoint:** `POST /imageGen` → body: `{ prompt, systemPrompt, style, strength, visualIntensity, contentType, imageReference }`
2. **Auth & Inputs:** fetch Firefly token → upload mask (Drive URL) → (optional) upload `imageReference` → aggregate ref IDs.
3. **Prompting:** LLM (`gpt-4o-mini`) crafts `imageDescription` from `prompt` + `systemPrompt`.
4. **Routing:** `Switch` on `contentType` to decide presence of `imageReference`; `fix` node normalizes `{ style, strength, imageReference }`.
5. **Generate:** call `generate-async` (two variants: with/without `imageReference` in `style`) + `visualIntensity`; set model header `image4_standard`.
6. **Poll:** loop via `/poll` until `status: succeeded`.
7. **Fetch & Post-process:** GET result image → resize 1024×1024 → read meta for bg/top → composite (top over bg, centered) → JPEG.
8. **Respond:** return **binary image** to caller.
9. **Creds:** Cloudflare header auth for all Firefly endpoints.


 → `radiooptimism.lg.com/`

### Reddit → Pose → Scene JSON → Seedream → Telegram (very short)
1. **Start:** `Manual trigger` (manual).
2. **Reddit:** `Random Subreddit` → `HTTP: Top Posts1` → `Code12` picks a top image post (direct JPG/PNG).
3. **Guardrails:** `If32` loops if no image; `OpenAI3` (0/1 people check) → `If31` routes:
4. **People = 1:** `OpenAI2` describes pose → `AI Agent8` (JSON scene: camera/expression/clothes/lighting/scene/posttext) → `Edit Fields9`.
5. **Else:** wait & retry.
6. **Image Gen:** `Seedream` (Replicate) with composed prompt → `Poll for results12` → `If30/If29` success/fail loop.
7. **Delivery:** on success, `Telegram14` sends generated photo (caption “Seedream 4”).
8. **Post-step:** output flows to `trump.mp4` (Summarize node with notes: `trump1.mp4`, size `0.6`, ratio `16:9`).
9. **Models/Creds:** OpenAI (gpt-4o / gpt-4.1-mini); Replicate API; Telegram bot.

<TEXT>
VOICE CLONED
LIPSYNCED VIDEO
<TEXT>

<TEXT>
YOUTUBE
AI REVIEWER
W SUBS
<TEXT>

# YT Short → script → TTS → lipsync → subs → compose → Telegram

1. **Kickoff:** `PRESS ME_9` → cleanup temp + web dirs.
2. **Pick short:** Google Sheets → pick unused → YouTube `videos` → qualify (`Code13` → `If39`).
3. **Download BG:** `yt-dlp` (`SSH2`) → scale to 720p (`SSH3`).
4. **Analyze + comments:** Replicate (CogVLM) describe → fetch YT comments → clean.
5. **Script JSON:** OpenAI → `{ hook, answer, cta }`.
6. **TTS (w/ timestamps):** ElevenLabs ×3 → base64→binary → host to `/var/www/html/audio/`.
7. **Subs:** Parse alignment → build stylized `.ass` + segment lengths → upload to `/tmp/n8n/subtitles.ass`.
8. **Front clips:** Download 3 vids (`hook/awnser/cta`) → host to `/var/www/html/video/`.
9. **Lipsync:** Replicate `kling-lip-sync` for each pair → poll → download → rename to `/tmp/n8n/{hook,awnser,cta}.mp4`.
10. **Stitch:** FFmpeg concat (trim via segment lengths) → `/tmp/n8n/stiched.mp4`.
11. **Compose final:** 
  - Inputs: `/tmp/n8n/background.mp4`, `stiched.mp4`, `backgroundmusic.mp3`.
  - Filters: scale, timed overlay (switch pos by segment), burn `.ass`, mix VO + music.
  - Font: FiraSans to `/tmp/n8n/fonts/`.
  - Output: `/tmp/n8n/final.mp4`.
12. **Deliver:** Download and send to Telegram (`Telegram16`) → summary node `mowochi.mp5`.

**Notes**
- Keep FFmpeg quoting exactly; ensure font exists before subtitles.
- Credentials required: Replicate, ElevenLabs, Google, SSH.

<TEXT>
MULTI-TOOL
DESKTOP PET
TBWA
<TEXT>

## Desktop Pet — Features & Capabilities

### Core Pet Behavior
1. **Interactive Companion** — follows mouse, reacts to clicks  
2. **Idle Animations** — stickerbombs, hides when startled  
3. **Laser Beam (B)** — red eye lasers, burns screen trails, spawns pentagrams  
4. **Meteor Defense (B→G)** — 30s mini-game; shoot meteors, track hits  

### Image Generation & Editing
1. **Webhook Integration** — drag images → Upscale / Creative / Backbanana modes  
2. **Web Portal (--web)** — drag & drop UI, dual-image compare, prompt input, history  
3. **Edit Mode** — mask crop tool, composite edits, iterative workflow  
4. **Processing** — compress, resize, optimize uploads  
5. **Gallery** — UP / RAW / OUT versions; click to reuse  

### UI & Customization
1. **Sassy Messages** — cheeky popups (“You call this disruptive?”)  
2. **Drag & Drop** — supports multi-image workflows  
3. **Download & Clear** — save, clear, or delete results  

### Advanced Features
1. **Stickerbombs** — animated sprites, pause during use  
2. **Gestures** — pentagram drawings summon themed stickers  
3. **Smooth Motion** — easing, swirl-to-center, filtered effects  
4. **Particles** — sparks, fading trails  

### System Integration
1. **macOS Native** — PyObjC windowing, hotkeys (B, G, L), status bar  
2. **SSL Fallback** — works on restricted networks  
3. **CLI Modes** —  
   - `python3 main.py` → full app  
   - `python3 main.py --web` → web-only UI

<TEXT>
MCDONALDS
FAN FAVORITES
1.040.900 IMAGES
<TEXT>

## McDonalds Fan Favorites Backend
1. **Webhook Input** — Receives base64 image and style via POST  
2. **Code Node** — Converts base64 → binary, generates filename  
3. **OpenAI Image Edit** — Calls `gpt-image-1` to process image with prompt and high-quality JPEG output  
4. **If Node** — Checks if image generation succeeded  
5. **Wait Node** — Retries OpenAI call if result missing  
6. **Code Node (Output)** — Converts base64 response back to binary image, names it by style and timestamp  
7. **Google Drive Upload** — Saves result image to designated Drive folder  
8. **Respond to Webhook** — Returns processed image and metadata  
10. **Result** — Full automated edit → upload → return loop for fan image generation
